summary: Completed testing for 3 bug fixes: (1) Eunice Guzman admin code '0826' working, (2) Fixed notification dropdown off-screen issue in portrait/mobile mode, (3) Verified Report and Payroll modals have Close buttons at bottom. One fix was applied during testing for the notification dropdown positioning.

details: Admin code 0826 converts to euniceguzman@thriftycurator.com
Login redirects to /admin dashboard
Welcome toast shows 'Welcome back, Eunice Guzman!'
Admin name displayed correctly in header
Admin code 4399 still works as expected
Converts to matthewjesusguzman1@gmail.com
Login redirects to /admin dashboard correctly
BEFORE FIX: Dropdown was 20.1% visible (left=-286, right=72) - mostly off-screen
AFTER FIX: Dropdown is 100% visible (left=4, right=386)
Fixed by changing from absolute positioning with complex calc() to fixed positioning on mobile
Desktop positioning still works correctly (left=1192, right=1576)
Dropdown displays correctly on right side of viewport
Width: 384px, positioned at left=1192, right=1576
Fully visible within viewport
Report modal has Close button at bottom (81.2% from top of modal)
X button available at top right corner
Can be closed by clicking outside the modal
Generate Report button works correctly
Payroll modal has Close button at bottom
X button available at top right corner
Settings button and Generate Report work correctly
Top buttons are in a single row: $, Add, Edit, Report, Remove
Buttons have appropriate icons and colors
Responsive design - shows icons only on smaller screens

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Notification dropdown off-screen in portrait/mobile mode
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed dropdown positioning from 'absolute' with complex calc() to 'fixed' with left:1 right:1 on mobile (uses md: breakpoint for desktop styling)
bugs_fixed_during_testing.after: className='fixed md:absolute left-1 right-1 md:left-auto md:right-0 top-[120px] md:top-full md:mt-2...'

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All features working after notification dropdown fix)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both admin codes (0826 for Eunice, 4399 for Matthew) are working. Notification dropdown positioning was fixed for mobile - now uses fixed positioning on mobile and absolute positioning on desktop via md: breakpoint. Report and Payroll modals both have Close buttons at bottom plus X buttons at top right.
